title: cryptothladia parviflora
parts: Cryptothladia parviflora has many medicinal parts, such as the leaves, roots, and flowers, which contain various bioactive compounds. The leaves of Cryptothladia parviflora are rich in flavonoids, including quercetin and kaempferol, which are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The roots of the plant are rich in triterpenoids, including ursolic acid and oleanolic acid, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The flowers of Cryptothladia parviflora contain essential oils, including geraniol and linalool, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety and insomnia.
